summary: First iteration testing - Backend 100% pass (16/16), Frontend 100% pass. All backend APIs working correctly including chatbot (GPT-5.2). All frontend screens (Home, Map, Transport, Services, Profile) load and function correctly. Initial test script had selector/timing issues which were resolved.

react_native_issues.issue: Warning: Animated: `useNativeDriver` is not supported in web preview. Falls back to JS-based animation. Not critical but noted.

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ All backend APIs return proper status codes (200 OK)
✅ All React Native components properly used (View, Text, TouchableOpacity)
✅ All interactive elements have testID attributes
✅ API utility correctly uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL from environment
✅ Chatbot integration with GPT-5.2 working correctly
✅ Error handling present in API calls
✅ Transport screen loads correctly with all 6 routes (Трамвай №5, №28, Тролейбус №3, №7, Маршрутка №137, №185)
✅ Map screen loads correctly with all layer tabs (Safety, Eco, Light) and data

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All 5 screens working - Home, Map, Transport, Services, Profile. Storm toggle working. All features functional.)

seed_data_creation: No additional seed data created. Backend already has seed data for bridges, coastal zones, eco data, services, light reports, and ticket prices.
context_for_next_testing_agent: MVP fully functional. Backend 100% working (all 16 API endpoints tested and passing). Frontend 100% working (all 5 screens load correctly with proper data). Chatbot (Uncle Zhora) responds properly with GPT-5.2. Storm mode toggle works. All tab navigation functional. All features tested and working as expected.

test_categories.transport: 3/3 passed (routes, ticket creation with QR, bridges)

map_screen.data_loading: PASS (coastal zones, eco data, light reports)

services_screen.chatbot_response: PASS - Uncle Zhora responded in Ukrainian
